RUNESMITH2-BREAK.description: Destroy a Rune and activate its passive effect twice. Power-based effects will be removed before the start of your next turn.
RUNESMITH2-BREAK.title: Break
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE.description: Runes need Charge to activate their passive effects. Charge is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] when the Rune's passive effect is triggerred.
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE.title: Charge
RUNESMITH2-CRAFT.description: Create a Rune using [gold]Elements[/gold]. You can have no more than [blue]7[/blue] active Runes.
RUNESMITH2-CRAFT.title: Craft
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS.description: Elements (Ignis, Terra and Aqua) are spent to [gold]Craft[/gold] Runes and are used for other utilities.
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS.title: Elements
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCE.description: Increase damage, [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Potency[/gold] of a card by [blue]50%[/blue]. Can be stacked additively. [gold]Enhance[/gold] is removed after the card is played.
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCE.title: Enhance
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCED.description: Card damage, [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Potency[/gold] are increased by [blue]{Amount:diff()}%[/blue]. [gold]Enhance[/gold] is removed after the card is played.
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCED.title: Enhanced
RUNESMITH2-POTENCY.description: Potency is the power of a Rune when it is [gold]Crafted[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-POTENCY.title: Potency
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE.description: Recipe cards are drawn from the Recipe Draw Pile at the start of each turn.
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE.title: Recipe
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE_DRAW_PILE.description:
At the start of each turn,
[blue]2[/blue] [gold]Recipe[/gold] cards are drawn from here.

Click to view the cards in your [gold]Recipe[/gold] draw pile (shuffled).
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE_DRAW_PILE.title: Recipe Draw Pile
RUNESMITH2-STASIS.description: Prevent a card from losing [gold]Enhance[/gold] when played.
RUNESMITH2-STASIS.title: Stasis
